Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Entry Of Default And Default Judgment (Unlawful Detainer)-Ccp 473
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tina J. Collins of the Law Offices of James M. Millar, 981-8100, appearing for defendants and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS JOSE GUEVARA, ALFONSO GUEVARA and ORBELINA GUEVARA'S Motion For Relief From Entry Of Default And Default Judgment (Unlawful Detainer)-CCP 473 is granted. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
